---
title: "Nazi Germany"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
Draft gold case. Evidence text includes placeholders pending verified public-domain source passages.
:::

Nazi Germany is the first thin end-to-end case for the workbench.

Current chain:

Source -> Passage -> Claim -> Interpretation -> Score

Variable: Collective Immortality  
Provisional score: 3 / 5  
Review status: argument-review
